reason: Enabling FIPS mode on an already installed system is not supported; it requires the fips=1 kernel boot parameter set during installation. Changing crypto.fips_enabled on a running system can break cryptographic modules, cause service failures, or prevent boot.
estimated_impact: reboot required; FIPS mode change may break cryptographic modules; System may become unstable if FIPS not properly enabled at boot; Requires kernel boot parameter fips=1; May affect services relying on OpenSSL; Potential boot failure if not configured correctly
